ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: INFANTRY, BEASTS, SWARM only, they can move thru walls and foliage like it is nothing

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description:
at least 5" tall, -1 to hit.
if the attacker model can trace a line from its base(or hull) to the target base (or hul) without going over the terrain, you lose this bonus.
if attacker is on the terrain in between, or attacker and target are within 3" of the same terrain, you lose this bonus.
AIRCRAFT and 18+ wounds models never get this bonus.

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: +1 save throw (no invuln) vs meele attacks (if model didn't charge)

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: +1 save throw (no invuln) vs ranged attacks

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: +1 LS if unit entirely within 6"

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: -2" to the maximum movement, min 0, in move, charge, advance, fall back, if anything of the unit goes thru the terrain at any moment. FLY ignore this

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description:
al least 5" tall terrain, can't see THRU this piece, except AIRCRAFTS and models with 18+ wounds.
if even 1 point of the attacker model see the enemy model without going over terrain in between you lose this bonus.
if the model stand over/within the terrain you lose this bonus.

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: INFANTRY only, +1 to ow OR no ow and +1 to hit in meele

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: INFANTRY, BEASTS, SWARM only, they can go upstairs and move thru the floor and the ceeling

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: you basically can charge within 1" of the terrain and fight vs a unit within 1" of the same terrain, and so fight within 2" and not 1" like normal

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: you can't put stuff on top of this, you just can't, stop using the wobbly sindrome to cheat

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Token
ContainedObjects.Description: this terrain gives no cover
